author: y4rr
content: Done. Five changes: (1) deleted dead BroadcastScalarBackward.numel field; (2) deleted unused ops/higher_order.rs duplicate cond/scan implementation; (3) deleted fast_log_f32 + 4 tests (no callers, sibling fast_exp_f32 is what's actually used); (4) rewrote autograd/cond_scan.rs CondBackward / ScanBackward / ScanCarryBackward to route gradients through the branch/step output's own grad chain instead of returning identity to operands -- the previous implementation gave wrong gradients for any non-identity branch (e.g. mul) and ScanBackward returned 1 grad for 2 inputs which would have errored under the engine's count validator if anyone called .backward() on a scan output; (5) added 4 gradient-value tests pinning the correct VJPs through differentiable branches and step functions. Gates: fmt clean, clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, 1240 unit tests + 26 integration tests pass, whole-workspace check clean.
